cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Team,

I'm applying for the Software Engineer role at Triple-A. Your work bridging traditional finance and digital currencies caught my attention, particularly the focus on stablecoin payments that eliminate volatility for businesses.

I have practical experience with automation workflows and full-stack development. At EXAIL Robotics, I rebuilt our installation process and cut deployment time from 2 days to 2 hours. That's an 85% reduction, and now anyone on the team can run it without technical help. I also built ValoFenua, a real estate platform that processes 1,300+ daily listings through automated scraping and AI agents, using React, Supabase, and PostgreSQL. You mentioned Temporal for workflow execution. I've built similar event-driven automation pipelines using n8n and AI agents, so I understand the logic of reliable task orchestration.

I'm proficient in JavaScript and relational databases, and I'm completing my M.S. in Information Systems Engineering. Working on payment systems at a licensed institution like Triple-A, where the infrastructure has real regulatory stakes, is exactly the kind of concrete engineering challenge I want to tackle next.

Aodren Gloux

stack: Python, TensorRT, ONNX, AWS, Azure, GitHub, REST APIs, CI/CD

Focus sur l'IA et l'automatisation des pipelines (MLOps)

commentaire: Poste entry level en AI/MLOps idéalement situé à Singapour. Correspond bien à l'expérience en automation et intégration d'IA du candidat, bien qu'une montée en compétence sur les outils d'optimisation ML spécifiques soit nécessaire.

Dear Hiring Team,

I'm applying for the AI Engineer role at Seatrium. The intersection of industrial maritime systems and AI automation is exactly where I want to build.

I built ValoFenua, a real estate platform that runs a daily scraper collecting 1,300+ listings and feeds them into an AI agent that calculates price estimates from live market data. I also built a job search automation pipeline with n8n, AI agents, and an MCP server. These systems handle end-to-end data flow, not just model training.

I currently develop core features in C++ and JavaScript at EXAIL Robotics, including an eye-tracking system. I also redesigned our installation process. It used to take about 2 days. Now it takes 2 hours. That's an 85% reduction in deployment time.

I'm finishing my M.S. in Information Systems Engineering in 2026. Building AI pipelines for maritime operations sounds like a concrete way to apply automation to complex physical systems.

Aodren Gloux

cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Team,

I'm applying for the Backend Software Engineer role in TikTok Shop's Trading domain. Building transaction systems that handle high traffic with low latency is exactly the kind of challenge I want to tackle.

I currently develop software at EXAIL Robotics using C++ and JavaScript, and I have solid experience with Java from my academic and personal projects. I built ValoFenua, a real estate transaction platform that processes 1,300+ daily listings with automated pricing calculations. It uses PostgreSQL, REST APIs, and handles concurrent data processing similar to e-commerce flows.

I also redesigned the installation process at my current company. It used to take about 2 days. Now it takes 2 hours. That's an 85% reduction in deployment time. I shipped this improvement while maintaining core product features and fixing critical bugs.

I'm finishing my M.S. in Information Systems Engineering in 2026. TikTok Shop's scale and your focus on reliable, efficient transactions is where I want to apply my backend skills next.

Aodren Gloux
